description: Surgical facility directory: name, city, zone, OR utilization rate, chartered-partner status, specialties offered.
source_name: AHS Find a Facility directory + AHS surgical wait-time Power BI
notes: Facility list/location/specialties scrapeable from AHS facility pages. or_utilization_rate and chartered_partner_status are NOT publicly published per-facility, so those fields stay manual. Extend powerbi-scraper to capture facility metadata.

description: Individual specialists with specialty, zone, primary facility, 90th-percentile consult/surgery waits, completed surgeries, CPSA id.
source_name: CPSA Physician Registry + AHS surgical wait-time Power BI
notes: CPSA registry gives name/specialty/facility/cpsa_id via search API. Wait-day and volume fields come from the same AHS Power BI already scraped by powerbi-scraper (SURGICAL_RECORDS). Join the two.

description: Provincial comparison of hip/knee/cataract within-benchmark % and MRI median wait days across provinces.
source_name: CIHI Wait Times for Procedures
notes: CIHI publishes structured provincial wait-time tables (CSV/Excel via CIHI portal). The cihi-wait-times pipeline already ingests CIHI; extend it to also write provincial comparators.

description: Object (not array): StatsCan 2024 specialist-access satisfaction survey summary — satisfied/unsatisfied %, wait-segment distribution, life-affected %.
source_name: Statistics Canada — Canadian Community Health Survey (CCHS), 'Waiting for a specialist'
notes: StatsCan releases this as tables (Web Data Service / CSV). Released annually as a static object; fetch the table and map fields. Marked as object rather than array in the file.

description: Fraser Institute median wait weeks by specialty: GP-to-consult, consult-to-surgery, total.
source_name: Fraser Institute — Waiting Your Turn (annual report)
notes: Annual PDF report. The existing fraser pipeline is 403-blocked; the report series has been intermittent. Requires PDF parsing and is brittle. No structured feed.

description: Yearly median wait (days) for hip replacement, knee replacement, cataract, MRI, CT, 2015-present.
source_name: CIHI Wait Times Historical Series
notes: CIHI publishes historical wait-time series by procedure/year. Downloadable as structured tables; extend cihi-wait-times pipeline to backfill the yearly trend array.

description: Wait-time experience by demographic dimension (age / sex / income): % waiting under 1m, 1-3m, 3-6m, over 6m, satisfied %, life-affected %.
source_name: Statistics Canada — CCHS wait-time demographic tables
notes: StatsCan tables by age/sex/income. Available via Web Data Service (CSV/JSON). Requires mapping demographic dimensions to the array schema.

description: Per-facility surgical metrics: OR utilization, total surgeons, active waitlist, ortho/cataract 90th-day waits, completed this month, chartered flag.
source_name: AHS surgical wait-time Power BI (same source as SURGICAL_RECORDS)
notes: Most fields already extracted by powerbi-scraper into SURGICAL_RECORDS; re-aggregate by facility. total_surgeons and chartered flag are not in the Power BI and would stay manual.

description: Per-specialist comparison: 90th-day waits, 3-month volume, satisfaction, experience years, avg surgery time.
source_name: AHS Power BI + CPSA registry
notes: Wait/volume from Power BI (powerbi-scraper), identity from CPSA. patient_satisfaction, experience_years, avg_surgery_time are not publicly reported per physician — those stay manual.

description: Per-zone Primary Care Network capacity: PCN count, active providers, enrolled patients, total payments, patients/provider, funding/patient, providers/100k.
source_name: Alberta Health / Primary Care Alberta PCN funding & enrollment data
notes: Alberta Health publishes PCN funding/enrollment figures in ministry annual reports and Open Alberta datasets. Scrape Open Alberta for PCN enrollment + payments by zone.

description: Per-LGA community need: family physicians/100k, % claims outside LGA, ACSC hospitalization, FCSC rate, mood/anxiety ED rate, substance-abuse ED rate, socioeconomic risk.
source_name: Open Alberta LGA physician claims / Health System Service Utilization datasets
notes: Same LGA source already used by open-alberta-inequity pipeline (COMMUNITY_NEED_PROFILES). Extend that pipeline to also emit the curated LGA_COMMUNITY_NEEDS subset.

description: Minor-condition ED visits per 1000 grouped by continuity-of-care level, with descriptive text.
source_name: HQCA FOCUS on Healthcare — Continuity of Care
notes: HQCA FOCUS dashboard publishes continuity vs ED-use indicators. Dashboard is interactive (no clean API); scrape the rendered JSON or annual PDF report.

description: Per-zone patient continuity & satisfaction: high doctor/clinic continuity %, same/next-day access %, satisfied-with-wait %, overall-excellent %.
source_name: HQCA FOCUS Survey / FOCUS on Healthcare
notes: HQCA publishes FOCUS survey results annually (PDF + interactive dashboard). Scrape dashboard JSON or parse PDF for zone-level continuity/satisfaction.

description: APL lab collection sites: name, code, address, city, region, current wait minutes, Save-My-Place availability, appointment/walk-in flags, lat/long, daily volume.
source_name: Alberta Precision Labs (APL) location directory + Q.Me/Save My Place
notes: Location directory (name/address/lat-long/walk-in/appointment) is scrapeable from APL. Live wait minutes are exposed only inside the Q.Me booking tool (no public dashboard), so waitTimeMin and dailyVolume would need the booking-tool endpoint or stay manual.

description: Lab test turnaround times: test name, category, specimen type, STAT turnaround hrs, routine turnaround days, annual volume.
source_name: Alberta Precision Labs test information / Alberta Health lab standards
notes: TAT targets are in APL test directory pages / lab standards PDFs, but actual achieved TAT and annual volume are not published as structured data. Largely manual.

description: Per-facility imaging waits: MRI/CT p50 & p90 wait days, annual completed exams, scanner utilization %.
source_name: AHS Diagnostic Imaging wait-time Power BI / CIHI
notes: AHS publishes imaging wait times by facility (Power BI / performance pages). Extend cihi-wait-times or add an AHS imaging scraper for facility-level p50/p90. scannerUtilizationPct not publicly reported — stays manual.

description: Imaging priority-target compliance: priority level, target limit text, target days max, Alberta CT & MRI compliance %.
source_name: Alberta Health Diagnostic Imaging wait-time targets / CIHI
notes: Alberta Health publishes priority-tier compliance % for CT/MRI in performance reports. Scrape the performance-report tables.

description: Respiratory virus season summary: virus, tests performed, positivity %, hospitalizations, ICU admissions.
source_name: Alberta Respiratory Virus Dashboard
notes: Interactive dashboard updated twice weekly (Tue/Thu). No clean CSV API; scrape the dashboard's JSON data endpoints. Covers flu/COVID/RSV with tests, positivity, hospitalizations, ICU.

description: Wastewater signals for Calgary, Red Deer, Grande Prairie, Lethbridge (Edmonton site is refreshed by phac pipeline; the other 4 sites are hand-authored).
source_name: AHS Wastewater Surveillance / Alberta Public Health Lab + PHAC
notes: Alberta Respiratory Virus Dashboard includes a wastewater tab covering multiple sites. Extend the phac pipeline (or add an AHS wastewater scraper) to refresh the non-Edmonton sites from the dashboard JSON.

description: Childhood immunization coverage by zone/age-milestone/antigen: coverage %, target %, reporting year.
source_name: Alberta Health Immunization Coverage reports / PHAC
notes: Alberta Health publishes childhood immunization coverage by zone/antigen/age milestone in periodic reports. Scrape the report tables.

description: Notifiable disease incidence by year/disease/zone: case count, rate per 100k.
source_name: Alberta Health Notifiable Disease Reports
notes: Alberta Health publishes notifiable-disease incidence counts/rates by zone and year. Annual report tables; scrape.

description: Active environmental health advisories (e.g. cyanobacteria at beaches): zone, location, type, description, date declared, status, precautions.
source_name: Alberta Health Services cyanobacteria/beach advisories
notes: AHS publishes active cyanobacteria advisories as a webpage list. Scrape for active advisories; map location/zone/type/date.

description: Object (not array): outbreak-management protocols by setting (acute care, continuing care, etc.) — trigger thresholds, isolation, antiviral post-exposure, reporting.
source_name: AHS Infection Prevention & Control outbreak guidelines
notes: Policy/guidance documents (PDF), not tabular data. Would require parsing narrative PDFs into structured fields; updates are infrequent. Effectively manual reference content.

description: Per-LGA travel-for-care: % care delivered outside LGA, top destination facility, avg travel distance km, local bed leakage %.
source_name: Open Alberta LGA physician claims datasets
notes: careDeliveredOutsideLgaPct and bed-leakage derive from the same Open Alberta LGA physician-claims data already used by open-alberta-inequity. Extend that pipeline. avgTravelDistanceKm requires geocoding facility vs LGA centroid.

description: Per-LGA service access: facilities/10k, distance to nearest ED km, distance to nearest imaging km, providers accepting patients.
source_name: Open Alberta LGA data + AHS facility directory + alberta-find-a-provider
notes: Facility/10k and distances derive from AHS facility directory + LGA centroids (geocoding). providersAcceptingPatients reuses alberta-find-a-provider pipeline output. Combine existing pipeline outputs.

description: Yearly hospital efficiency: spending per staffed bed, hospitalizations per bed, surgeries per bed, hours worked per bed, standard stay cost.
source_name: CIHI Hospital Cost Performance / Health System Performance
notes: CIHI publishes hospital cost/efficiency indicators by province/year. Structured tables; extend cihi-nhex pipeline or add a CIHI cost-performance fetch.

description: Physician billing by specialty group: physician count, total payments $M, average gross payment, services per patient.
source_name: Alberta Health — AHCIP Statistical Reports (Open Alberta)
notes: Alberta Health publishes AHCIP physician-billing statistical reports by specialty on Open Alberta (CSV/Excel). Direct download; map specialty groups.
